programme.title: Acapulco shore
programme.desc: La relación entre Dania y Jey sigue en problemas mientras que Brenda comienza su campaña para irse a los golpes con Rocío. Dania y Anahí por fin tienen su iniciación.

programme.title: Acapulco shore
programme.desc: Llega el día de la última fiesta en la casa y el desmadre comienza. La boss le entrega una carta a Jawy de Mane y la nostalgia lo invade.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Unas nuevas vacaciones comienza para los de Shore y en esta ocasión Mazatlán será testigo de las fiestas, amores, desamores y peleas de la familia más disfuncional de la televisión.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Nacha y Mane se enfrentan a Dania al ver que le tira sus cosas al agua. Los mariscos llegan para la cruda y la ida a un bar termina en una fiesta en la casa. Mane molesta a Dania y un nuevo enfrentamiento entre ellas comienza a gestarse.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Una nueva integrante llega a la casa. La boss anuncia que tienen que trabajar para ser parte del carnaval. El team tendo insiste en que Jey se lleve a la cama a Nacha y un bar es el sitio de encuentros y desencuentros de la familia.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Tadeo recibe una sorpresa y los shore se conmueven con su reacción. La celebración del cumpleaños de Xavier comienza. Chile y Jey tienen problemas de erección y Jawy reta a Chile a un duelo de boxeo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La espera termina y Jey por fin logra cumplirle a Nacha. Celia manda a un grupo a trabajar al acuario. La celebración de Xavier continua y las comadres se escapan del antro, lo que hace que Mane y Jawy terminen peleando.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jawy y Mane continúan. Xavi decide invitar a Pepe para que se quede en la casa. Los Shore comienzan a dudar de Fernanda. Karime busca al notario para que valide su virginidad y Mane y Fernanda terminan en un fuerte enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane y Fernanda se van a los golpes. El conclave decide hacerle un examen a Fernanda para evitar su expulsión. Un partido de fútbol entre los Shore y los Big hippo decidirá el futuro de la casa y Pepe recibe una propuesta de amor eterno.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El examen termina y Fernanda se mantiene en la casa. Chile escucha el plan de las rechazadas y las delata. Una maestra de baile pone en su lugar a Mane y a Karime. En un restaurante se desata una batalla campal.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Después de enfrentar a Mane, Dania toma una decisión importante. Los Shore reciben una clase de banda donde nace oficialmente el corrido del “Verga muerta”. Jawy habla con Fernanda y Mane está decidida a dejar sola en la casa a Dania.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Xavier y Pepe se enfrentan nuevamente. Un grupo de brujas llega a la casa y no todos quedan contentos con sus premoniciones. En la noche de noche de chicas, Dania le pide una disculpa a Mane y su reacción deja a varios sin palabras.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore se preguntan sobre el paradero de Dania. Chile y Diana tienen una cita romántica. Karime y Mane terminan en el hospital. Pepe y Ramiro reciben una llamada que cambia sus planes y los Shore se alistan para el carnaval.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore llegan el carnaval. Karime y Potro tienen un momento de mucha intimidad. Un hipnotizador llega a la casa. Nacha tiene sospechas y decide hacerse una prueba de embarazo y una nueva integrante llega a las vacaciones.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jawy and Mane's tension continues. Xavi decides to invite Pepe to stay at the house. The Shores start to doubt Fernanda. Karime seeks out the notary to validate her virginity, and Mane and Fernanda end up in a heated confrontation.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane and Fernanda get into a physical fight. The conclave decides to give Fernanda an exam to prevent her expulsion. A soccer match between the Shores and the Big Hippos will determine the future of the house.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The exam concludes, and Fernanda stays in the house. Chile overhears the rejected girls’ plan and exposes them. A dance instructor puts Mane and Karime in their place. A brawl erupts at a restaurant.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: After confronting Mane, Dania makes an important decision. The Shores attend a band class where the "Verga Muerta" corrido is officially born. Jawy talks to Fernanda, and Mane is determined to leave Dania alone in the house.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Xavier and Pepe face off once again. A group of witches arrives at the house, and not everyone is pleased with their predictions. During the girls' night, Dania apologizes to Mane, and her reaction leaves several people speechless.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The Shores wonder about Dania's whereabouts. Chile and Diana go on a romantic date. Karime and Mane end up in the hospital. Pepe and Ramiro receive a call that changes their plans, while the Shores prepare for the carnival.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The Shores arrive at the carnival. Karime and Potro share a very intimate moment. A hypnotist comes to the house. Nacha has suspicions and decides to take a pregnancy test, while a new member joins the vacation.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane and Karime perform a binding ritual on their loves, and Nacha explodes at Jey. Potro catches Isa kissing Chile and gets upset. Mane finds out that Potro is talking bad about Jawy and decides to take action.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The tension between Jawy and Potro continues to rise. The newcomers go topless on the zip line. Nacha confronts Isa, while Jawy decides that the beach is the perfect place to sort things out with Potro.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Talía arrives by surprise and takes them partying. Nacha is rushed to the hospital. Chile Finally kisses Isa . The shores have a very provocative session with Sexologist Silvia Olmedo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The Shores get ready for the end of their adventure in Mazatlán. The guests arrive to celebrate the final party. Potro and Tadeo show up when things are already wild, and an incident between Chile's women is about to explode.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The final party ends in a fight among Chile's harem. Mane prepares a surprise ceremony for Jawy to reaffirm her love. The Shores leave the house, but Karime and Potro save the best for last.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The Shore gang is ready for vacation. This time, the most dysfunctional family on TV is back in Acapulco, the birthplace of the crew. Parties, drama, romance, and heartbreak will break out in this beautiful port.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The party continues and the Captain stirs up trouble in the house. The tension between Isa and Fernanda boils over and takes an unexpected turn. Nacha joins in and Isa's reaction surprises everyone in the house.

programme.title: Mysteries & Monsters

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro dice que él no es Leonardo, pero no le creen. En el mercado todos le dan la bienvenida a Leonardo creyendo que es Pedro. Ignacio y Fernanda son amantes. Paloma anima a Leonardo y él le dice que ella lo hace sentir bien.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro le pide disculpas a Fernanda. Leonardo conoce a su nueva psicóloga. Pedro llama a su abuela, así se entera de que Leonardo está en su casa. Pedro se disfraza para ver a su familia y ve cuando Leonardo besa a Paloma.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro se pone celoso al ver a Leonardo con Paloma, decide seguir viviendo la vida de su clon. Fernanda vista a su hermano en la cárcel, mientras Yesenia visita a su padre, el Chamoy. Pedro logra entrar a la computadora de Leonardo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Cocó engaña a Leonardo haciéndole creer que es su prometida, Paloma está celosa. Fernanda le dice a Ignacio que odia a Leonardo y seguirá con los planes de venganza. Ignacio va al mercado La Raza para averiguar qué está pasando.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro logra evitar que Ignacio descubra a Leonardo en el mercado. Basilio, quien resulta ser doctor en finanzas, le dice a Pedro que Ignacio le tiene envidia. Pedro encuentra a Fernanda en una situación comprometedora.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Fernanda le advierte al Chamoy que si vuelve a golpear a Santiago le pondrá precio a su cabeza. Justino encuentra a Paloma y a Leonardo juntos e insulta a su hija, ella se va de la casa. Irma le pide un préstamo a Melquiades.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo encuentra a Paloma y salva a Cachito de ahogarse, ella le da las gracias y se besan. Pedro va a buscar a Humberto para conversar sobre el pasado y al final abraza a su padre. Ignacio le ofrece a Basilio que trabaje para él.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro recibe una llamada de Cocó y Paloma se molesta. Cocó llega a casa de Perico y muestra su supuesto anillo de compromiso, a él le da un ataque de pánico. Ignacio le propone a Fernanda drogar a Leonardo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo cae en la piscina y Fernanda, aunque duda, decide salvarlo. Basilio va al Mercado la Raza y se topa con Leonardo, esto lo confunde y decide investigar sobre Pedro. Inés le propone a Paloma que viva en su casa.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Basilio le tiende una trampa a Pedro para que revele su verdadera identidad. Paloma y Cachito llegan a vivir a casa de Pedro. Leonardo le dice a Renata que no siente nada por Cocó. Humberto anuncia que su hijo vuelve a la empresa.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro le cuenta todo lo que ha pasado a Basilio, éste le pregunta porque sigue con la farsa y él le dice que así a su familia no le faltará nada y porque se enamoró de Fernanda. Humberto comienza a desconfiar de Fabiola.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Basilio intenta contarle la verdad a Ignacio, pero lo interrumpen. Decide hacer las paces con Pedro y acuerdan apoyarse mutuamente. El Chamoy intenta engañar a Leonardo y ponerlo en contra de Inés. Fabiola cree que Humberto sospecha.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro se ve en apuros frente a los accionistas, pero Basilio logra ayudarlo y cierra el trato con los españoles. Humberto rechaza a Fabiola, le pide que admita su infidelidad. Leonardo le dice a Cocó que no puede casarse con ella.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo le dice a Paloma que Cocó se siente mal y que se quedará en su casa, ella se pone celosa. Ignacio droga a Pedro. Inés le dice a su hijo que si no quiere a Cocó no se case, él le da las gracias y la abraza.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes crispy pan-fried pork chops, roasted butternut squash salad with za'atar and parsley, and a super-simple spinach salad.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia celebrates with an indoor clambake made with fresh lobster, mussels, and clams, and served with honey cornbread and bistro slaw.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: It's burger night in the Davison house and Julia's got all the fixings: home ground beef, crispy homefries, and her all-time favorite condiment, homemade pickled onions.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia shares her recipe for an easy, one-pan bratwurst dinner with tender kale and potato salad and skillet-roasted pears with caramel sauce for dessert.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Quick and easy weeknight cooking can still yield great results. We start with two quick-cooking classics— sautéed chicken cutlets and pan-seared shrimp—and elevate them from the everyday.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we offer delicious, relatively straightforward fare that appeals to young and old. What kid—or adult—doesn't look forward to macaroni and cheese or barbecued chicken?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We take some of our favorite restaurant recipes—Crab Towers and Flambéed Pan-Roasted Lobster—and show you how to make them work in a home kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Huge meaty flavor—combined with spice, smoke, and fire—epitomizes Texas barbecue. Could we figure out how to make authentic Texas beef ribs in our Boston-based test kitchen?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: On occasion, we break the bank and buy a beef tenderloin. The tender, buttery interior is the big draw, and the combination of a healthy dose of seasoning and the flavor from the grill is a perfect solution to an otherwise mild-tasting piece of meat.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare grilled chicken with a sweet-and-sour dipping sauce and grilled salmon with a sweet, sticky glaze.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare chicken enchiladas and Mexican rice.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Sure, raw tomato sauces are fast, but if the sauce is watery and bland, who cares? Likewise, asparagus-based pasta sauces are often bland and boring. In this episode, we keep things simple while avoiding these common problems.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen prepares two Indian favorites: chicken biryani and mulligatawny soup.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pissaladière is Provençal street food, a fragrant, pizza-like tart prized for its contrast of salty black olives and anchovies against a backdrop of sweet caramelized onions and thyme. We figure out how to make a great version of this French classic.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Too often, eggplant Parmesan is a soggy, oily mess. And pasta with chicken and broccoli is heavy and bland. But after many tests in the kitchen, we've come up with recipes that give these simple, honest dishes the respect they deserve.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta all' amatriciana is perhaps Rome's most famous dish. Despite the fancy name, it's nothing more than long-strand pasta sauced with tomatoes, onion, bacon, and hot pepper flakes and dusted with cheese. We show you how to master this simple dish.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Osso buco, literally "bone with a hole," is the Italian term for veal shanks. This meaty cut, akin to beef shanks or lamb shanks, becomes meltingly tender when stewed for several hours in a covered pot. We serve it with a simple and satisfying polenta.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our goal was simple: Take French onion soup and baked goat cheese salad and make stellar versions of these bistro favorites.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A sticky bun should be neither dense nor bready, neither saturated with butter nor so sugary that it makes your heart race. The crumb should be tender and feathery and the sticky glaze gently chewy and gooey. Here's how we made ours.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Brownies are too often dull, and blondies (as well as congo bars, their coconut-flavored cousins) can be even worse, since they are even plainer. We decided to keep things simple while focusing on developing superior flavor and texture.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The holidays are stressful enough. We created a foolproof rolled butter cookie dough that tasted great and can be turned into an array of different cookies.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Cakes baked in Bundt and tube pans are popular for a variety of reasons. These pans make cakes that are especially attractive, and the cakes themselves tend to be pretty simple to prepare. In this episode, we make angel food and a chocolate Bundt cake.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop the perfect pumpkin cheesecake recipe, but we never figured it would take 30 cheesecakes to develop a great recipe worthy of the finest holiday dinner.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Watch as we take two modern classic desserts —a chocolate volcano cake and caramelized pears—and make them approachable for the home cook.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our hearty frittata is just as filling as an omelet, but a whole lot easier to prepare and serve. We also uncover the formula for the ideal quiche filling and deliver a tender, buttery pastry crust filled with moist, smooth custard.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we look at a few of our favorite Tex-Mex dishes: tomato salsa, quesadillas, and beef tacos.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen shows you how to make two hearty soups: black bean and tortilla.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Mark Stacey's antiquing adventure continues in the Cotswolds. Mark discovers a rural idyll that inspired a best seller novel while Christina learns about an incredible war hero.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Cheshire, Christina Trevanion ends up deep underground and Mark Stacey finds himself in such a predicament he has to call for help! Mark finds a Home Guard practice rifle while Christina makes a peculiar purchase of a human jaw.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Mark Stacey travel in the West Midlands in their classic car. Mark visits the factory that profited from the Victorian obsession with death. Christina learns why the original Land Rover became a global phenomenon.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a race to the finish! Just twenty pounds separates Christina Trevanion and Mark Stacey. Mark is literally stuck and struggling waist-deep in antiques. Christina moves into property and buys a rather unique home.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin and Paul Laidlaw visit the West Coast of Scotland. Military buff Paul gets excited when he finds some desk ink stamps dating from the Cold War. Natasha ends up on ice as she gets to grips with an ancient sport in Ayrshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Cumbria is the destination for Natasha Raskin and Paul Laidlaw and their classic Mercedes. Natasha visits a mint cake factory while Paul discovers an intriguing side to Cumbria's wartime past.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin and Paul Laidlaw are in historic York. Paul struggles to find anything he likes before plumping to buy a haul of agricultural salvage. And Natasha's eyes are turned by some spindles on a rocking chair.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin and Paul Laidlaw are taking their classic car around Norfolk and Suffolk. Paul finds himself as captain of a rare and valuable boat on the Norfolk Broads while Natasha ends up in Thetford woods looking for bunnies.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Natasha Raskin are antiquing in Norfolk and there's one last auction in Diss. It's the final 'Round Britain Rummage' and they unearth a rarely seen art nouveau food warmer and a charming 19th-century table croquet set.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The West Country beckons James Braxton and Raj Bisram. Kicking off in Bath, they motor through Bristol and Hungerford before boarding the Isle of Wight ferry. Both believe an island auction will attract bidders looking for nautical fare.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and James Braxton are on a buying spree on the Isle of Wight. James has a conversation with a man he believes is Elton John while Raj falls for a teddy and a ride on doggy. Only a few pounds separate the experts!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a shopping spree through Somerset that ends at an auction in Woking. James thinks a pair of Staffordshire figures will attract big bids, despite some damage. Raj hopes the bidders will appreciate his experimental Moorcroft vase.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Raj Bisram are in the beautiful New Forest. James dives into buying in the village of Brockenhurst, but all bets are off when Raj catches up with him in the market town of Ringwood.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Raj Bisram set off in Cheshire. Raj hears why a group of daredevil playboys decided to drive their car in to the Savoy, and James learns why a pint in a pub played a vital role in verifying the quality of silver in 1773.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return in a new series. At Samares Manor in Jersey, objects from all over the world are examined.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce takes the team to the Lancashire coast for a busy day in the magnificent Blackpool Tower Ballroom.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return for a second visit to the Tower Ballroom in Blackpool.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return with a second helping from a recent visit to Hertford College, Oxford.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team head for Devon's beautiful Tamar Valley, and weigh anchor at Morwellham Quay. Objects fascinating the experts include an ugly brown jug.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Members of the public at Lincoln Cathedral have their antiques valued by experts.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Members of the public have their antiques valued by experts. A second visit to Lincoln Cathedral for Fiona Bruce and the experts.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Members of the public have their antiques valued by experts. Fiona Bruce and the team are in County Durham for a visit to The Bowes Museum.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of experts welcome thousands to Bletchley Park near Milton Keynes, home of the Enigma code-breaking team in World War Two.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A return visit to Bletchley Park near Milton Keynes for Fiona Bruce and the experts.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Burghley House near Stamford in Lincolnshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts head to the Scottish borders for another busy day of valuations at Abbotsford, near Melrose, once the home of Sir Walter Scott.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team set sail for the Channel Islands where the people of Guernsey give them a warm welcome at Saumarez Park.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are at full throttle as they arrive at Brooklands Motor Racing and Aviation Museum near Weybridge in Surrey.

programme.title: Sharks: The Truth
programme.desc: Sharks have evolved over millions of years, honed to make them the most effective underwater hunters on Earth.

programme.title: Sharks: Size Matters
programme.desc: Sharks with horns; sharks that walk on their fins; a nuclear submarine is disabled by a shark.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Sharks
programme.desc: A countdown and a death-defying journey to meet ten of the word's deadliest sharks.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Sharks
programme.desc: The epic conclusion to the death-defying journey to meet ten of the word's deadliest sharks.

programme.title: Sharks: On Their Best Behavior
programme.desc: Filmmaker Mike deGruy examines shark evolution, hunting, feeding, reproduction and defenses.

programme.title: Wildlife Specials
programme.desc: An in-depth look into wildlife and nature.

programme.title: Dolphins: Spy in the Pod
programme.desc: Spinner dolphins hunt shoals of lanternfish while dodging giant rays.

programme.title: Dolphins: Spy in the Pod
programme.desc: Revealing the family life of the orca and dolphins that wear sponges on their noses.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Sharks: The Truth
programme.desc: Sharks have evolved over millions of years, honed to make them the most effective underwater hunters on Earth.

programme.title: Sharks: Size Matters
programme.desc: Sharks with horns; sharks that walk on their fins; a nuclear submarine is disabled by a shark.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Sharks
programme.desc: A countdown and a death-defying journey to meet ten of the word's deadliest sharks.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Sharks
programme.desc: The epic conclusion to the death-defying journey to meet ten of the word's deadliest sharks.

programme.title: Sharks: On Their Best Behavior
programme.desc: Filmmaker Mike deGruy examines shark evolution, hunting, feeding, reproduction and defenses.

programme.title: No Kitchen Required
programme.desc: The chefs cook for the Palong hill people of Chiang Dao, Thailand; one chef is accused of hoarding an ingredient.

programme.title: No Kitchen Required
programme.desc: The chefs try to win over the hearts of their Fijian hosts.

programme.title: No Kitchen Required
programme.desc: The chefs hunt wild boar, cast nets for fishing and spear octopus on Hawaii.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: The series kicks off with a complete guide to cooking on coals, from lighting the fire to the barbecue essentials; Ainsley also tests different types of barbecues.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: Visiting the Greek Island of Alonnisos to sample traditional barbecue consisting of spit-roasted lamb and hortopitta.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: Visiting South Africa to find unusual recipes for cooking over coals.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: Visiting Thailand to sample a unique recipe for fish and chips and a barbecue cornucopia.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: The history of Jamaican barbecue recipes from the Arawak over 1,200 years ago.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: Sampling the cuisine of Australia.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel celebrates the quirkiness and individuality of London fashion in her kitchen, proving it's more about creativity than the price tag when it comes to getting your food looking and tasting good.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel makes some simple colorful canapés that are perfect for a party and creates a sophisticated jelly for grown-ups.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: London makes Rachel feel nostalgic about her childhood, so she visits an ice-cream lab in North London and makes a firm family favorite - Strudel.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel explores London's fast food scene, and whips up berry tartlets with cream cheese frosting and cauliflower cheese burgers.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel prepares her favourite food for the perfect lazy day, cycles along a canal, visits her friend Tom's urban garden, and whips up a shepherdless pie.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel celebrates London's love with the East as she makes sticky chicken with Malaysian salad and soft steamed buns.

programme.title: Nigella's Amsterdam Christmas
programme.desc: Nigella travels to Amsterdam to enjoy the festive season in the Venice of the North; she visits her favorite places in the Dutch capital city, picks up special ingredients for her festive feasting and makes traditional Dutch speculaas.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella introduces her love of Italian food through a spectacular yet simple Sicilian pasta with tomatoes, garlic and almonds, and a mid-week family feast of tagliata.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella Lawson shares the secrets of her Italian roast chicken, served alongside a saffron orzotto; Nigella prepares coffee ice cream for dessert, inspired by the ice cream parlors of Florence; a chocolate olive oil cake provides an extra treat.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Pork loin stuffed with Parma ham and oregano, served alongside her speedy mock mash and lazy person's vignarola.

programme.title: Nigellissima

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Phoenix to help the owner of The Armadillo Grill get her business back in order as she desperately tries to pay back her father, but faces $450,000 of debt.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon attempts to save the legendary Las Vegas speakeasy Capo's Restaurant and bring it back to its pre-pandemic glory.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In his hometown of Las Vegas, Jon rescues a beloved party bar that blames their downfall on the pandemic until Jon discovers the truth.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After running a successful floral business for two decades, owner Randi thought she could parlay that success into a budding new bar. Unfortunately, she never rose to the occasion.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In his second-ever re-rescue, Jon Taffer returns to Champagne's Cafe to help the struggling bar survive the pandemic and maintain its Las Vegas legacy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer must save an ambitious but rookie family-run brewery that was forced to open during the pandemic.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: For his 200th rescue, Jon rescues a family who bought a Mexican restaurant at the height of the pandemic and put their daughter's future on the line to chase the bright lights of Vegas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An historic gay bar in Las Vegas is on the verge of closing after losing all of its entertainment options due to the Covid-19 pandemic.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Pahrump, Nevada to save a VFW hall from permanently closing its doors and to help its commanding officer step away to take care of his ailing wife.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A premiere billiards hall in Las Vegas is at risk of closing after it's owner struggles to recover from the effects of the pandemic...and his inept manager.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer tries to help a struggling married couple save their karaoke bar in downtown Las Vegas and get their goals to start a family back on track.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After a series of devastating losses, Jon must help an owner and her staff get back on track from their personal tragedies as well as a global pandemic.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon attempts to rescue a bar in Maricopa, Arizona whose owner has squandered a half a million dollar investment from his parents.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Texas to help a husband and wife rescue their failing bar and learn how to be better partners in business.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a young couple’s romance is threatened by their parents, they make a pact to end their lives together rather than end their romance. Meanwhile, Cody encounters a mermaid while diving, and of course no one believes him… except CJ.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: While testing new scuba diving technology, Sam, Neely and Caroline witness a jet crash. They rescue the pilot, who reveals that he was transporting a canister that contains a deadly virus. Meanwhile, the team must shut down an illegal nude beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline finds herself being sued for negligence in civil court by the angry and bitter mother of a drowning victim. CJ babysits a neighbor’s newborn and realizes she wants to be a mother. But is Cody ready to be a father?

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ and Cody transport an injured sea lion to the animal recovery facility at Sea World. While there, Samantha gets the idea to promote lifeguarding by planning a Baywatch-theme stunt show at Sea World.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A crazed young woman is causing trouble on the Venice Boardwalk and Neely suspects it is more than meets the eye. Meanwhile, Newman meets his dream woman – who doesn’t speak English.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A mysterious, disfigured man whom the public dubs "the phantom lifeguard," is secretly saving people and sending love notes to CJ. When CJ goes missing the team sets out to find her and the “phantom.”

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Young, ambitious and sexy lifeguard candidates compete for a chance to attend Rookie School. Mitch is offered a promotion to Captain and has a tough decision to make. Lani McKensie faces the sinister return of a former lover.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hobie, Lani, April, and Skylar are among the trainees competing for a few open slots as Baywatch Lifeguards. Hobie isn't sure he wants to follow in his father's footsteps, but when a vengeful jet skier comes after April, Hobie comes to her rescue.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Veteran lifeguard Jack 'JD' Darius has a dark secret in his past. He comes to Baywatch to throw his rescue can in the ring for the open Lieutenant slot, but young and ambitious Taylor Walsh also wants the job, and she's ready to fight for it.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch, Sky, and April find a dead man on the ocean floor. Their search for answers to his demise leads to the retirement home where he lived, and his two friends who seem to be hiding the true story. The chemistry between Cody and Lani heats up.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: April is devastated by her younger brother Charlie’s terminal illness. Mitch and Hobie want to make sure Charlie's wishes are granted, and that the time he spends with the lifeguards at Baywatch is the best of his life.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline's acting career isn't going well so she returns to Baywatch to figure out what she really wants to do with her life. The lifeguards are plagued by a sleaze-ball helicopter reporter who somehow knows intimate details about their love lives.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After the devastation of the last big L.A. earthquake, Baywatch lifeguards are taking recent Seismic activity seriously. Caroline and JD 's tempestuous relationship heats up, forcing Caroline to make a critical decision that could change her life.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The hot Santa Ana winds blow an air of mystery to Baywatch when two sea lions perish in an unexplainable event. Mitch must uncover the cause to stop it from happening again. April is courted by Manny and Hobie, forcing her to choose between them.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jessica says mom Patricia says she is defying odds becoming a record-setting weight lifter while simultaneously battling Stage 3 brain cancer. Jessica insists her mom isn't sick at all & she is lying about her health to gain sympathy. Emotions run high!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The dangers of teenage sex & underage drinking continues. Plus, in 2011, Rehtaeh, 15, was raped by four classmates , & after intense bullying, the teen took her own life. Then, Alexis, who says she too was raped at 15. A powerful cautionary tale. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tensions run high in this father/daughter battle conclusion. McKinley, 18, confronts her dad for allegedly being "abusive" in her childhood & a "pedophile," claims he denies. Dr. Phil questions Cory on an incident leading to Cory's sexual battery arrest.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his discussion with Willie Jessop, former spokesperson for the FLDS and former bodyguard of self-proclaimed prophet Warren Jeffs. Jessop comes face-to-face with former FLDS members and critics who say they don't believe a word he says.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with David and his family.They claim Danielle is a violent, angry "devil" who becomes possessed. But are David and the family to blame for Danielle's behavior? Is there something deeper going on with Danielle? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a bizarre abuse case, Gypsy Rose Blanchard's mother forced her to pretend she was ill, undergo countless surgeries, shave her head, insert a feeding tube & use a wheelchair. A web of deceit & torture led to murder. Gypsy Rose talks with Dr. Phil.Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Elsa says she was abused daily & beaten with ropes, chains, whips & umbrellas by the people she thought were her adoptive parents, Joe and his wife, Evangeline. Elsa says the abuse lasted for 19 years until an unlikely person stepped up to rescue her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Victoria wrote to Dr. Phil after she says her daughter, Jessica, 18, physically attacked her on multiple occasions, leaving a gash in her head from a cellphone & her house damaged, as well as her body bruised after a Thanksgiving day family throw down.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil examines the case of missing mother of two, Susan Powell. Her husband, Josh Powell, is now a person of interest, and Susan's parents, Charles and Judy Cox, are looking for answers. Go behind the headlines of this heartbreaking story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Melissa says Destoni, 14, is an aggressive, violent bully. She's chased her sister with a butcher knife, yells at teachers in the hallways but Destoni crossed a line when she threatened to shoot her teacher and other students, causing suspension. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with D’Andre who claims his abusive relationship with his girlfriend, Autumn, is partly due to what he calls her “messed up” upbringing. Hear what D’Andre says about violating the restraining order that Autumn has against him. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From curing rare forms of cancer to foreseeing mass destruction, to freeing others from sickness and sin, Julia believes she is "God's chosen prophet". Parents, Mark and Cheryll, worry their daughter is mentally ill with deep concern for the grandkids.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The conversation heated when Dr. Phil gave self-professed bully Temica RoShawn a reality check about her aggressive behavior. Guests Ross & Lyndy say weeks of bullying culminated in their 15-yr-old son being sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kirby made headlines -- and spent 13 weeks in jail -- after his wife, Renee, videotaped him spanking her with a wooden spoon. Hear why Kirby claims Renee left him no choice but to act as he did. Plus, what other behavior did Renee catch on camera? Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Angie & Hannah who say step-father & step-grandfather Ralph routinely sexually abused them. For the first time in 15 years, Angie & Hannah are face-to-face with Ralph, who denies all claims. Is Ralph cleared by a polygraph test?

programme.desc: The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Milburn 'Drysdale's precocious 11-year-old nephew swindles the hillbillies of all the valuable art objects in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett has inherited a castle in the English countryside. Jethro insists that everyone, except Granny, wear the royal raiment's of Elizabeth (the First, of course).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro believes his moment for Hollywood stardom has arrived. Casting for Bachelor Sheriff Knows Best is occurring, and Jethro mistakenly thinks he has been chosen.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny competes against Mrs. Drysdale as artists and tells Jed about her uncle, the barn painter. Jed and Jethro go to an upscale gallery to buy a painting, but are mistaken for gardeners. Bessie the chimp dabbles with a paintbrush.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Ellie seems to be no longer interested in Dash Riprock Granny decides it's time to do a little matchmaking. She thinks the handsome actor would be perfect for Miss Jane.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the Clampetts into hiring a housekeeper. Unfortunately, the housekeeper that is hired is uninterested in doing housework.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's old friend, the widow Adaline Ashley, comes to Beverly Hills, and Granny sets to playing matchmaker for her and Jed. Mrs. Drysdale and her snooty friends are misled to believe Adaline is a socialite jet-setter.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to turn his favorite thing, eating, into a job by getting the family involved in buying a diner. The family's choice of offerings lead to a lack of customers, so Mr. Drysdale tries to fix things.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro, worried that his diner the Hungry Gizzard has no customers, has a wonderful idea. He busts in on Mr. Drysdale trying to impress the wealthy Vanderpools, announcing the restaurant is going topless. Confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to leave sunny California because she misses winter, sending Mr. Drysdale into a panic. The banker enlists Miss Jane in an elaborate scheme to convince the Clampetts that a blizzard has occurred.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The last televised wrestling match was such a success that the promoter wants a rematch. Granny isn't interested until Rebecca's parents visit.

programme.desc: Granny is worried about Miss Jane's spinsterhood and convinces Jethro to ask her to marry him. Granny assures him that she will decline the proposal, but Hathaway accepts, leading to panic in the Clampett household.

programme.desc: Granny is on the warpath concerning the chaos caused by Ellie's critters and declares either they go or she does. Mr. Drysdale is equally irritated by the expense of his wife's poodle. Jed tries to find a solution.

programme.desc: Granny and Jethro believe they have psychic abilities, but Granny's predictions stop coming true. With her reputation on the line, she picks a stock for Mr. Drysdale that could cost him a small fortune.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After an unusual online audition process, the rookie candidates for the 2020 squad move into an isolated training camp bubble amid the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 20 rookies try to master a socially distanced version of the famous kick line and some intricate choreography, and Kelli helps the ladies get fitted for uniforms.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Guest choreographers test the rookies with new routines, the veterans arrive at camp determined to earn back their spots, and country star Mickey Guyton has inspiring words for the hopefuls.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure's on for rookies and vets as the hopefuls head to the stadium for their first field rehearsal, and Kelli and Judy must decide which women won't move on in training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies outshine the veterans when choreographer Travis Wall teaches a sexy dance number, and Kelli and Judy give some of the vets a wake-up call.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The dancers get a chance to showcase their unique talents during show group auditions, and Kelli and Judy deliberate with guest judges to select the elite squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The dancers test their ability to think on their toes during a series of mock-press interviews, and as auditions wind down, a shocking bit of news shakes up the process for Kelli and Judy.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make cuts via video chat after a positive test for COVID-19 halts camp, Charlotte Jones hands out the iconic uniforms, and the team performs its game-day entrance.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stabbing victim has his throat slashed while waiting for his wife. A man is shocked to learn that his rental box truck was reported stolen. Spice is found in a nervous passenger's purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver and his wife in a high-speed chase, a paranoid man vandalizes his roommate's car, and a shoplifter can't keep her story straight.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues suspects for reckless driving, police respond to the armed robbery of a pizza delivery driver, and a deputy detects a unique scent during a traffic stop.

programme.desc: Officers stop a suspicious pedestrian, police and their K-9 dog search for weapons in a suspect's vehicle, and a wanted woman is stopped on a moped with her pet dog.

programme.desc: Deputies chase a wanted man who makes a break for it, a man leads officers on a vehicle pursuit, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.desc: A sibling reluctantly called authorities when his belligerent brother refused to leave his mother's home. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local grocery store. Officers investigate a suspicious vehicle parked at a local gas station.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga el brutal asesinato de una familia, rastrean al asesino hasta la casa de al lado, que podría pertenecer al asesino en serie "Dr. Jekyll".

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Hodges y Wendy llevan a un grupo de exploradores de CSI de la escuela secundaria a una excursión, embellecen su papel en la resolución de casos y llevan su tarea un poco demasiado lejos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante es descubierto asesinado en la escuela de Lindsey, la investigación da un giro brusco cuando el equipo de CSI descubre una conexión poco probable entre la muerte del niño y atrocidades del pasado.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un cómico legendario de los viejos tiempos de Las Vegas se reunirá con su compañero en el escenario solo por una noche, hasta que uno de ellos es encontrado muerto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una madre que se pensaba que estaba de duelo por la pérdida de su familia hace tres años se convierte en sospechosa en una investigación de CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe investigar a uno de los suyos cuando Langston es acusado por un antiguo colega de ser parte de los asesinatos del Dr. Jekyll. Primera parte de dos del final de temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Las vidas del equipo de CSI están en juego a medida que se acercan al escurridizo Dr. Jekyll, y es posible que más de un miembro del equipo no viva para ver su captura. Segunda parte del final de temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston lucha por su vida después de ser apuñalado por un psicópata, Nate Haskell, mientras que los otros CSI asisten a un funeral que se vuelve mortal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La histeria se produce cuando un tiburón ataca a una mujer en la piscina de un casino de Las Vegas. El equipo de CSI debe determinar si el asesino es humano o tiburón.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una convención de vampiros y hombres lobo está en el corazón de una investigación del asesinato en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sqweegel, un asesino en serie que está castigando a los héroes locales que albergan secretos ocultos, está a la caza en Las Vegas..

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una mujer que sufre de una condición llamada "acumulación" se convierte en sospechosa de asesinato cuando se encuentra un cadáver enterrado bajo pilas de basura y escombros dentro de su casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante universitario termina muerto después de un espectáculo de "Caminar con dinosaurios", el equipo de CSI debe determinar si su muerte fue un asesinato o un accidente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI descubre los restos destrozados de un hombre, se encuentran con múltiples sospechosos que pueden ser responsables de su muerte.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the Miami Taunter kills again, Horatio comes face-to-face with the matriarch of the suspected killer's family, who may or may not help his investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a beloved tennis coach is nearly killed, Calleigh discovers a personal connection to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio uncovers a corruption scandal that pits him against an old adversary, and Calleigh makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When one of the CSI's biggest enemies is murdered, Horatio must determine which of his team members is a suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Megan Donner returns to the CSI unit in time to work on a jet crash in the Everglades. They discover a victim five miles from the crash.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After fishermen catch a tiger shark and discover a partial human torso in its stomach, evidence leads the team to suspect murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a rape and a murder takes place on a Miami beach, Horatio and the team are sent to investigate the mansion of the Hamilton family.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When his mentor is killed while defusing a bomb, Horatio goes on a personal mission to find the culprit. Megan wonders if he is too close to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a priest is murdered, Horatio and the team must investigate. A lip print on a drinking glass sets a 12-year-old altar boy as a prime suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A 5-year-old girl is murdered at a restaurant/playland catering to parents and children, and Horatio and the team must investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team investigate the murder of a male stripper found dead after a female sex party. Evidence suggests he had sex prior to his death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a family is slaughtered in their home, Horatio and the team try to find the killer with the evidence left at the scene.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Three people are shot and killed in downtown Miami during rush hour and Horatio and the team must catch the killer fast.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A professor from a local university is found hanging from a tree after being tortured, she had been tortured for at least 4 hours before the hanging.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Los Everglades de Florida infestados de caimanes y serpientes se convierten en la zona cero de una serie de asesinatos inconexos, justo cuando los incendios arrasan el raro ecosistema.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño avión choca contra un vecindario residencial, los restos revelan un cadáver en la bodega de carga, junto con medio millón de dólares en efectivo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El mundo de los videos extremos de patinetas se vuelve mortal cuando la competencia se acalora dentro del estudio. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La temporada de impuestos comienza con todo cuando dos agentes de Hacienda aparecen muertos. Llaman a Horatio Caine y al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El club nocturno más sexy de South Beach en Miami se convierte en un hervidero de venganza cuando un asesinato cierra las puertas de un servicio de citas único.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una niña de ocho años se convierte en el peón inocente de un juego feo y abusivo que termina en asesinato. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un reencuentro de la escuela secundaria se vuelve mortal cuando un compañero de clase se deja llevar por un resentimiento de 15 años, Horatio y Yelina descubren que Ray aún puede estar vivo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI trabaja contrarreloj para encontrar al supuesto cómplice en un caso de asesinato con hacha de hace años antes de que se ejecute al asesino convicto.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI corre contra el tiempo para localizar y desactivar una bomba radiactiva que estallará en medio del centro de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI se enfrentan a la infame y mortal pandilla Mala Noche de Miami después de que un funeral se convierte en el escenario de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un accidente de navegación familiar revela un siniestro complot de estafadores para robar diez millones de dólares en lingotes de oro. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de una adolescente que estaba de fiesta en Miami de camino a las Bahamas con su clase de secundaria.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un joven enfrenta cadena perpetua, y posiblemente algo peor, a menos que Horatio pueda probar su inocencia contra adversidades insuperables.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo corren contra el tiempo para descubrir quién está tratando de incriminar a Horatio por el asesinato de una mujer con la que ha estado saliendo.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella work with a deaf family to find their daughter’s killer. The team investigates the murder of a young skating sensation.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a rich real estate agent is found dead in a brownstone, Mac and Stella work with evidence that suggests he was either a kidnapper or kidnapee.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Mac find a corpse in a salt truck which is then later identified to be a high-powered extreme sports executive.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead in a maze at the Queen’s county farm museum, the CSIs discover a cult-like fraternity with harsh punishments.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac investigates the death of a girl found in a bathtub filled with rose petals. Stella questions the death of a man who fell in his fish tank.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Danny investigate a case in which a delusional ex-con is found dead in his home while lying on top of a bed of cash.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates a case in which magic-trick inspired murders occur including a woman being cut in half while in a wooden box.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay find popular chef Alec Green dead in the wine cellar of his trendy restaurant with a corkscrew dangling from his chest.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A knight in shining armor impaled with a lance in central park and a businessman stabbed by an ice pick in a nearby hotel share a connection.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial killer’s verdict overturned when Mac jails his arresting officer, but a victim surfaces sporting the killer’s signature.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella is forced to deal with painful memories when Det. Valens visits and says her DNA is connected to a Philadelphia cold case making her a suspect.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are puzzled when evidence and witnesses point to John McEnroe as their murder suspect despite his air-tight alibi.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella, and Hawkes are forced to save the lab when a drug lord and his crew descend upon the CSI’s vault to retrieve their merchandise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder on the Statue of Liberty rattles New York City as the CSI team tries to catch the killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un sospechoso armado es descubierto en una escena de crimen protegida. La investigación de rutina se convierte en una persecución a pie a través de los túneles del metro de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Los detectives descubren que la investigación de una víctima de homicidio vehicular entra en colisión con un aficionado de los Medias Rojas, encontrado muerto en un estacionamiento.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando un desayuno informal se convierte en un tiroteo, el detective Mac Taylor debe volver a armar las piezas del crimen.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Es verano en la ciudad mientras Mac y Hawkes investigan la muerte sospechosa de un escalador que intentaba escalar el edificio Empire State.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Stella y Danny investigan por qué una mujer joven, hermosa y ciega fue estrangulada en un tejado. ¿Las fiestas de caricias tuvieron algo que ver con eso?

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Es un caos en el zoológico del Bronx. Mac, Danny y la nueva CSI Lindsay Hamilton investigan la muerte de un hombre arrojado a los tigres.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un hombre encontrado muerto a golpes en el festival de San Genaro conduce a Mac y Stella de los callejones de la calle Mott a los poderosos operadores de Wall Street.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Mac, Stella y Lindsay descubren por qué arrojaron a una joven bailarina con un billete de lotería ganador en el bolsillo desde el teleférico del puente de Roosevelt Island .

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: La testigo de un brutal asesinato en un ascensor ha desaparecido y, mientras los CSI la siguen, descubren el mundo de las lolitas de Manhattan.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El detective Mac Taylor y el teniente de CSI Miami Horatio Caine siguen la evidencia desde la calurosa Miami a la acerada Nueva York mientras se acercan a Henry Darius.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando un asesinato entra en juego en una partida de póquer de altas apuestas, el equipo de CSI trabaja para descubrir por qué lo que creían que se trataba de la venganza de un tramposo era una identificación errónea.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: En un hospital de muñecas de Nueva York, Mac y Danny recuperan el cadáver del doctor de muñecas bajo cientos de partes de cuerpos –partes de cuerpos de muñecas.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Una estrella en ascenso del roller derby cae muerta en medio de una pelea y Mac y Stella llegan a la pista para investigar la muerte.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Encuentran a un multimillonario muerto en su habitación, cuando Danny comienza a procesar la escena, activa un botón de pánico y queda encerrado con la víctima.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Eudomar es alérgico a los analgésicos y alivia su dolor con películas porno. Por otro lado, Vanessa buscó apoyo en la religión porque sufrió violencia doméstica y el pastor la golpeó.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Antonio tiene problemas de erección por la diabetes, pero su esposa piensa que el problema lo tiene ella. Además, Mauricio fue acusado de narcotráfico por culpa de su 'roommate' Gonzalo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Adelay es un pelotero que logró salir de Cuba para jugar en las Grandes Ligas, pero está lesionado. Además, Juan Carlos descubrió que su hijo se masturba con fotografías de Evelyn, su esposa.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: La hija de Yunaida salió con un novio que tiene antecedentes penales y fingieron un secuestro. La esposa de Carlos vino a Estados Unidos y le anunció que su hijo había muerto, pero era falso.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Jennifer trajo a su hija de Cuba, pero la joven no piensa ayudarla económicamente con la casa. Por otro lado, Roberto preparó y costeó la boda de la hija de su esposa, ya no quiere pagar.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Rosa sufrió una golpiza en su casa, los atacantes buscaban droga que su hermana había escondido. Bianca tiene una fundación para ayudar gente sin recursos, pero está lucrando bajo esa fachada.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Obligado por las circunstancias, un padre se tiene que separar de su hijo. Además, Andrea demanda a los padres de la niña que alquiló y exige que le devuelvan el dinero del depósito.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Yuri, la empleada doméstica, jugaba con el niño de la casa hasta que fue secuestrado por error. También, Lázaro es muy popular en las redes por las cadenas de oro, pero son falsas.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: María y Ricardo no se ponen de acuerdo en cómo educar a su hijo, ella es más recta, mientras él es permisivo. También, Angie y Violeta corren carreras de autos y tienen diferencias.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Santa visitó un club en México con su esposo y comprobó que las bailarinas eran menores de edad. También, Liz ha invertido mucho dinero en la carrera de medicina de su hija, quien abandonó.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: La sobrina de Jazmín fue adoctrinada por el Estado Islámico en Siria. En otro caso, Alberto perdió su empresa de tours con delfines como terapia, dice que Eugenia es la culpable.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Papote tiene un bar y emplea a menores que beban cerveza sin alcohol para atraer a más clientes. Por otro lado, Andrea contrató a Yamir, una médium, quien solo la toca con intenciones sexuales.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Edwin y Érica se pelean la custodia de una hija con un temperamento muy fuerte. Eduardo dejó a su hermano en México, años después se lo encuentra en Miami con otro género.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Marcos y Gabriela contratan un vientre de alquiler, pero notan que la gestora de la criatura no está bien de salud. Luis se casa con Edith para que lo reclame legalmente, pero ella se demora.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Nobody believes Frasier when he claims to be dating a famous supermodel.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The sibling rivalry between Frasier and Niles reaches a fever pitch when they try and "top" each other's 65th birthday gift to their father, Martin.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles' Halloween costume party becomes a comedy of errors when he mistakenly thinks that Daphne is pregnant -- and Frasier's the father.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier is stunned when he learns the true identity of the man who is the father of Roz's baby.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles' envy and a series of mishaps may prevent Frasier from attending the festivities honoring him for his 1,000th radio show.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam loans out his lucky cap to a baseball player who's in a slump.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Inebriated for the first time in his life, a timid young priest-to-be makes an amorous advance toward Diane and concludes he's not fit for the monastery.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane incurs the wrath of Sam and the entire Cheers clan when she exposes a customer who spouts captivating, tall-tales of his exploits as a World War II spy.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A casting agent pursues Sam, offering more than just a business proposition.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Saddened by the death of her cat, Diane gains little sympathy from the Cheers clan and begins to reevaluate her relationships with everyone, especially Sam.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane is aghast when a very pregnant Carla tricks the surprised, but ecstatic egghead Marshall Lipton into believing he's the father.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam's shocked when his ex-teammate comes out of the closet at the bar.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam unknowingly hires and ex-murderer to escort Diane on a double date.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam enters a photo of Diane in the annual Miss Boston Barmaid contest.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles gets Daphne to help him plan a phony dinner date with a neighbor so she won't realize how much he really cares for her.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz worries about the fate of her new baby when she discovers that the parents of her baby's father have two of the biggest noses she's ever seen.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Desperate to make a love connection, Frasier and Niles join forces to throw a singles party -- and end up vying for the affections of the same woman.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier attempts to be in three places at once as he tries to keep his girlfriend, brother and dad happy.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Frasier leads a protest demanding better treatment of radio station employees, the head honcho at the station's parent company fires them all.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Frasier appears to be in denial over losing his job, Niles, Roz and Martin join forces to bring him back to reality.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier dreads the idea of attending his high school reunion, which always seems to coincide with a downturn in his life.

programme.title: Los Dos Rivales
programme.desc: Los Treviño y Los Guereña mantienen una rivalidad originada muchos años atrás. Por necesidad de dinero, el heredero de los Treviño, y la heredera de los Guereña, tienen que disfrazarse usando ropa del sexo opuesto para proteger y vender sus ranchos.

programme.title: Locura Musical
programme.desc: Un musical en tono de comedia, narrando las peripecias que realizan los encargados de un cabaret de élite en la ciudad de México para poder mantener el éxito alcanzado hasta entonces.

programme.title: Pistoleros malditos
programme.desc: En esta película, que acaba con los mitos sobre el infame tiroteo de Corral, Stacy Keach interpreta a Doc Holliday, quien se alía con el mariscal Wyatt Earp (Harris Yulin) para desarmar una banda de delincuentes.

programme.title: Cometieron dos errores
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood protagoniza esta historia sobre una banda de justicieros que cometen dos errores: ahorcar al hombre equivocado y no terminar el trabajo. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern y Dennis Hopper coprotagonizan este western de acción.

programme.title: Vuelven los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Un noble pistolero (George Kennedy) contrata a una brigada formada por los hombres más peligrosos del oeste para liberar a un líder revolucionario de los campesinos de una importante prisión mexicana en este clásico del oeste.

programme.title: Llega un jinete libre y salvaje
programme.desc: En el Viejo Oeste de los años 40, dos ganaderos de poca monta se alían para hacer frente a los estragos de un terrateniente despiadado que pretende ampliar su imperio a cualquier precio. Protagonizada por Jane Fonda, James Caan y Jason Robards.

programme.title: Pistoleros malditos

programme.title: La raíz del miedo
programme.desc: Una película de suspenso judicial, acerca de un abogado astuto (Richard Gere) que lleva el caso aparentemente perdido de un monaguillo (Edward Norton), acusado de asesinar a un ilustre sacerdote católico.

programme.title: Mente indomable
programme.desc: El exitoso drama ganador del Óscar, que lanzó las carreras de Matt Damon y Ben Affleck, cuenta la historia de un genio de clase obrera obstinado a quien no le va bien en la vida, hasta que conoce a un profesor de psicología cercano (Robin Williams).

programme.title: Casa de arena y niebla
programme.desc: Massoud Amir Behrani usó gran parte de sus ahorros para mejorar las chances de encontrar un buen esposo para su hija. Tras lograr esto, destina los fondos restantes a la compra de una casa en una subasta, pero termina inmerso en una batalla legal.

programme.desc: El exitoso drama ganador del Óscar, que lanzó las carreras de Matt Damon y Ben Affleck, cuenta la historia de un genio de clase obrera obstinado a quien no le va bien en la vida, hasta que conoce a un profesor de psicología cercano (Robin Williams).

programme.title: Fachon Models
programme.desc: Ulises es un actor fracasado que trabaja en avisos comerciales. Después de reunirse con Carolina, su novia de la escuela primaria, encuentra la motivación para obtener mejores conciertos y ponerse en forma.

programme.title: I.Q: fórmula para amar
programme.desc: Todo el mundo sabe que Einstein es un genio científico. Pero ¿qué hay de Einstein el casamentero? I.Q. pone esta noción a prueba y logra resultados ganadores en esta "divertida y cálida comedia romántica" que aplauden críticos y público.

programme.title: 40 días y 40 noches
programme.desc: Después de una ruptura amorosa y una serie de conquistas insatisfactorias, un hombre hace una promesa de no tener relaciones sexuales durante 40 días y 40 noches. Josh Hartnett y Shannyn Sossamon protagonizan esta sátira.

programme.title: Un despertar glorioso
programme.desc: Un presentador de la vieja escuela renuncia a su programa de noticias de mucho tiempo debido a las costumbres nuevas. Es reclutado por un productor estrella que quiere revivir un programa matutino endeble.
