programme.desc: Un presentador de la vieja escuela renuncia a su programa de noticias de mucho tiempo debido a las costumbres nuevas. Es reclutado por un productor estrella que quiere revivir un programa matutino endeble.

programme.title: The Crow ES
programme.desc: Esta exitosa película visualmente imponente y llena de acción, basada en la serie de cómics, sigue el regreso de la tumba de un joven guitarrista roquero que, junto a su prometida, son asesinados brutalmente por una pandilla de criminales.

programme.title: El cuervo 2: Ciudad de Ángeles
programme.desc: Esta secuela veloz y llena de acción de "El cuervo" sigue el ascenso de la víctima de asesinato Ashe Corven, que regresa a la vida gracias a un misterioso cuervo. Con la ayuda de una mujer llamada Sarah, se venga de sus asesinos uno por uno.

programme.title: Ejecutor
programme.desc: Despedido hace algún tiempo del FBI, Mark Kaminsky se pone en contacto con su anterior jefe, Shannon, cuyo hijo ha sido asesinado. Decidido a encontrar al asesino, Shannon necesita la ayuda de Kaminsky y se ofrece a reincorporarlo si tiene éxito.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: The Crow ES
programme.desc: Esta exitosa película visualmente imponente y llena de acción, basada en la serie de cómics, sigue el regreso de la tumba de un joven guitarrista roquero que, junto a su prometida, son asesinados brutalmente por una pandilla de criminales.

programme.title: Ejecutor

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos. Desde sus humildes inicios en un pequeño escenario hasta llegar a las brillantes luces de Hollywood.

programme.title: Me late chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: El Norte
programme.desc: Celebremos el 35 aniversario de la nominada al Oscar "El norte" en una exquisita restauración de este clásico sobre inmigrantes guatemaltecos, que huyen de la violencia y buscan una vida mejor en Estados Unidos.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: El Crimen del Padre Amaro LAS
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: El Norte
programme.desc: Celebremos el 35 aniversario de la nominada al Oscar "El norte" en una exquisita restauración de este clásico sobre inmigrantes guatemaltecos, que huyen de la violencia y buscan una vida mejor en Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Un casamiento de Navidad perruno
programme.desc: Mientras que Rusty, el perro de Susan, y Cheri, el poodle de Jake, ayudan a que sus dueños se enamoren, necesitarán un milagro navideño para lograr que sus caóticas familias lleguen a tiempo a la boda.

programme.title: Mi dulce Navidad
programme.desc: La exitosa ejecutiva de marketing Sadie es hija de los dueños de una tienda de chocolate tradicional en un pequeño pueblo de Estados Unidos. Decide pasar la Navidad en su ciudad natal y descubre que sus padres planean vender la tienda.

programme.title: Navidad en buena forma
programme.desc: Un romance navideño entre una profesora de gimnasia y un hombre de negocios. Las chispas vuelan, y el amor cambia todo, en especial en las fiestas. Amanda Kloots, coconductora de The Talk, formará parte del festival de cine de Sundance de este año.

programme.title: Navidad Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Con solo dos días antes de Navidad, Angelina se embarca en una misión casi imposible para tratar de salvar a su malcriada hija de 14 años, de ir por el camino equivocado. ¿Podrá Angelina sacar a su hija de la lista de los traviesos?

programme.title: Un pueblo navideño
programme.desc: Para salvar su reputación, Piper Jensen, un genio en relaciones públicas y dueña de su propia agencia de relaciones públicas, acepta trabajar para el dueño de un Pueblo de Santa en dificultades, ahí descubrirá el amor y cuán mágica es la Navidad.

programme.title: Pandemia lupina
programme.desc: Un joven fotógrafo de vida silvestre arriba al aeropuerto JFK infectado con una enfermedad extraña. Haciendo fila en la aduana, de repente se convierte en un hombre lobo. Las víctimas a las que muerde no mueren, sino que también se transforman.

programme.title: Stephen King's Silver Bullet
programme.desc: En esta película de terror, basada en la novela Ciclo del hombre lobo, de Stephen King. Un hombre lobo está aterrorizando a un pequeño pueblo y depende de un niño discapacitado, y su tío para liberar la ciudad.

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: Pandemia lupina

programme.title: Terror al anochecer
programme.desc: En 1946, el pueblo de Texarkana sufrió una serie de experiencias traumáticas que todavía recuerda hoy, treinta años más tarde, entre marzo y mayo, cinco personas fueron asesinadas a manos de un loco enmascarado.

programme.title: Una película de miedo
programme.desc: En esta divertida parodia de una película de terror, un grupo de adolescentes son acosados por un psicópata enmascarado. Protagonizada por Carmen Electra, Marlon Wayans, Jon Abrahams, Shannon Elizabeth, Shawn Wayans, y Anna Faris.

programme.title: Más de mil palabras
programme.desc: El agente charlatán Jack McCall (Eddie Murphy) tiene la mira puesta en un gurú, el Dr. Sinja. Cuando aparece un misterioso árbol Bodhi en su patio, Jack se da cuenta de que deberá portarse mejor antes de que caiga la última hoja del árbol, o morirá.

programme.title: De fiesta en las alturas
programme.desc: Un elenco estelar, que incluye a Tom Arnold, Kevin Hart, Method Man y Snoop Dogg se apodera de los cielos en esta irreverente comedia sobre una aerolínea que ofrece sensuales sobrecargos, casino y el antro de moda a ¡10,000 metros de altura!

programme.title: Una película de miedo
programme.desc: En esta divertida parodia de una película de terror, un grupo de adolescentes son acosados por un psicópata enmascarado. Protagonizada por Carmen Electra, Marlon Wayans, Jon Abrahams, Shannon Elizabeth, Shawn Wayans, y Anna Faris.

programme.title: Instinto fatal
programme.desc: Una seductora mujer empuñando un picahielo se lanza, con amor y risa, a una divertida parodia de Carl Reiner, leyenda de la comedia y director de 'The Jerk'. Coprotagonizan Armand Assante, Sherilyn Fenn, Kate Nelligan y Sean Young.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under
programme.desc: A self-assured American sharpshooter moves to Australia in search of employment and finds work for a despotic land baron in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: The Shootist
programme.desc: Afflicted with a terminal illness, John Bernard Books, the last of the legendary gunfighters, quietly returns to Carson City for medical attention from his old friend Dr. Hostetler.

programme.title: Rio Grande
programme.desc: Lt. Col. Yorke leads his cavalry troops to the Rio Grande to fight a warring tribe. Yorke’s toughest battle lies ahead when his unorthodox plan to outwit the elusive Apaches leads to possible court-martial.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs, and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Chitty Chitty Bang Bang
programme.desc: A weird inventor, Caractacus Potts, invents an amazing flying car, which drives by itself. It takes him and his Family to Vulgaria, where the sinister buffoon Baron Bomburst kidnaps the car.

programme.title: It's A Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy leads a hilariously zany cast of Hollywood's greatest comedians (including Milton Berle, Sid Caesar, Ethel Merman and Mickey Rooney) as eight vacation-bound motorists set off on a mad-cap, side-splitting race to find a stolen fortune!

programme.title: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: This hysterical comedy from director Billy Wilder finds Tony Curtis and Jack Lemmon masquerading as women in order to elude irate Chicago mobsters while befriending a beautiful singer (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Whom can she trust?

programme.title: Kiss Me, Stupid
programme.desc: In this comic gem from the legendary Billy Wilder and his long-time writing partner I.A.L. Diamond, Dean Martin is a famous singer targeted by two would-be songwriters who encourage a waitress (Kim Novak) to coerce Dino into a song-buying mood.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine, and Fred MacMurray are superb in this tale of love and ambition in the world of big business that went on to garner a Best Picture Oscar.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: In The Princess, Miss Simmons plays Lydia of Lichtenstein who visits Felix's studio for a portrait sitting and meets Oscar, who, unaware of her station, tries to date her.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Dr. Janet Craig, rebuffed as a physician by the local males, sets out to win them over as a woman--and a good cook.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: In an attempt to get rid of lady Dr. Craig, Uncles Joe flakes an illness that becomes real.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Granny's eatable gift might be the only thing to save the valley from losing their beloved train when Bedloe returns to Hooterville with a brand-new scheme to bring about the end of the Cannonball.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Bobbie Jo decides to become an emancipated woman and leave Hooterville.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: To go to New York or not to go to New York--that is the question faced by Steve and Betty Jo after Steve gets a big job offer.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Plans for the annual Hotterville Founders' Day celebration are wrecked by generation-gap dissension.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Hank Kimball proposes marriage to lady carpenter Ralph Monroe while under the influence of heavy medication. Lisa plans an amazing country wedding only to find out that, Sam, the Justice of the Peace, has forgotten to new his license.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver become alarmed that the youth of his beloved town, Hooterville is dwindling so he calls an emergency town meeting to prevent them from leaving. The next thing Oliver knows is that his barn has been volunteered for the new youth center.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver and Lisa discover a root cellar under their house and become trapped when it collapses in on them. Their only hope to get rescued rides on a hilarious game of charades between Arnold the pig and Mr. Drucker.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver's crops are getting stomped on by Irene the cow. In his frustration, he fires a shotgun to scare Irene away. Instead the blast leads to a hilarious misunderstanding among Lisa, Eb and a life-sized fiberglass cow.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver has become the new School Board President. Unfortunately, Oliver's first day on the job is anything but smooth. Arnold the pig is expelled from his duties as the school's mascot, and Fred Ziffel implores Oliver to defend Arnold.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After receiving a tax refund from the IRS, Oliver inspires his fellow citizens to make similar requests. There's only one problem... those making requests haven't paid their taxes! Nevertheless, the IRS mistakenly sends out half a million dollars!

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carter's sister. Carter is determined to break them up.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter assigns Pyle to drive his precious car back from the airport but the car is stolen immediately. Now Pyle has 24 hours to find it before Carter gets back and kills him.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer won't rest until he helps to reunite Sergeant Carter with Miss Bunny after they had a lovers spat.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer and his platoon engage in "war games" against a rival unit and Pvt. Pyle ends up captured and a prisoner of war.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter orders Pyle to take a week long furlough but instead of going back home to Mayberry, Pyle takes a civilian job on base so he can remain close to the Sergeant.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer's acts of kindness towards his new waitress friend is mistaken for romantic interest by her cruel Marine Sergeant boyfriend.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Grandma Pyle visits Gomer, reads his fortune and predicts Gomer will cause something bad to happen; then Sergeant Carter loses his voice while yelling at him.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan gets Klink to deal in supposedly rare cuckoo clocks so that he can send out information.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Newkirk poses as a traitor to send information via a propaganda radio broadcast.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan has to get Klink back into shape or Burkhalter plans to send him to the Russian Front.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Marya, the White Russian, uses Schultz to impersonate Goering just as Hogan is trying to save a trainload of stolen art.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Kinchloe participates in a camp boxing match to divert attention from Hogan's planned heist.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Burkhalter's niece is getting married and by having LeBeau design her wedding gown, Hogan is going to contact an underground agent, and later free him after capture by the Gestapo.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Dressed in a German uniform for a mission, Carter finds himself serving in the German army.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Betty is asked to investigate the death of an inspiring young actress after she witnesses the deceased and another couple in a heated argument at the hotel across from her own on the very same night of her death.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A woman that is helping to develop a revolutionary new type of television set disappears without a trace, and the company that she works for asks Barnaby to find out what happened to her.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Betty's cousin Foxey Dolan comes into town and sets her and Betty up for a night out on the town with a man she just met. He also happens to be on the run from crooks he's stolen from, and they'll kill to get their goods back.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A woman that is helping to develop a revolutionary new type of television set disappears without a trace, and the company that she works for asks Barnaby to find out what happened to her.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett must thwart an elaborate assassination attempt on the life of a self-exiled Greek doctor.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A tender memory in McGarrett's past is suddenly shaken when his former fiancée, Cathy Wallis, finds her husband slain. McGarrett becomes personally involved in the case and jeopardizes his job when Cathy becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The theft of a priceless violin belonging to a Russian musician touring in Honolulu threatens to explode into an international incident

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The efforts of McGarrett's Five-O police unit to rescue a wealthy young boy from his ransom-hungry abductors backfire when McGarrett's own man, Kono, also becomes a prisoner of the thugs. Kono helps Timmy escape, but is unable to make a getaway himself.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The investigation of a boat explosion in which a wealthy businessman dies and McGarrett is seriously injured leads the Five-O team to believe that the widow's former husband is responsible for the sabotage.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Raylyn Walker, a young prostitute and mother, is found murdered at a truck stop. The prime suspect is her last customer, Rocky, but he has an alibi. Tibbs is overwhelmed more by a visit with his in-laws, than by the birth of his newborn twins.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Gillespie and Tibbs investigate an allegation that a popular school teacher has molested a student; however, it seems that the people of Sparta have already passed judgement, and details from the teacher’s past only increase their suspicions.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A drug dealer flees the scene after he runs over a young boy. When the offender is arrested, Chief Gillespie is determined to see him stand trial, but the Feds offer him a deal that will set him free if he testifies against a powerful drug lord.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Lieutenant Bubba Skinner rekindles a romance with his high school sweetheart, the newly-widowed Christine Millings. To Bubba's surprise, her attorney is murdered and she's suddenly looking like the prime suspect.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: While fishing on his day off, Bubba Skinner's dog unearths a dead baby. The investigation leads to a mentally-challenged girl and her family who’s not interested in talking. Will they get past the family’s secrets to learn the truth about the baby?

programme.title: Dark Shadows

programme.desc: En el 2022 ya nadie se ríe de los que necesitan terapia, porque todos estamos en terapia. Por eso, para olvidar los problemas, te traemos las terapia más divertida con estos 6 sketches. Dale play al episodio.

programme.desc: Mueble O' Algo crea un programa infantil, pero Clara, convencida de que ese programa va a volver todo el mundo gay, envía una petición al congreso de los Estados Unidos para cancelar el programa.

programme.desc: Cartman cree que es demasiado maduro como para salir con Stan, Kyle y Kenny, y decide buscar nuevos amigos en internet, pero termina metiéndose con un montón de pedófilos.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Los chicos se preguntan si los inválidos (como Timmy) o los judíos (como Kyle e Ike) van al cielo, después del sermón del Padre Maxi y la Hermana Anne. Mientras tanto, Sadam Hussein vuelve al infierno para ver a Satán.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Esta es la continuación de ''¿Van los inválidos al infierno?''. Cartman y los chicos crean su propia iglesia, al ver que los de la verdadera iglesia no puede ayudarlos. Mientras tanto, Satán debe escoger entre dos amores.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Es el primer día de los chicos en el cuarto grado y no les gusta para nada su nueva maestra, la Señorita Selastraga. Entonces, les piden a los vecinos de Kyle que los ayuden a regresar al pasado, para volver al tercer grado.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Diamond says SP begged her to have his kid. Jenell says SP wanted to have a third kid with her! SP denies both kids! Does Tone owe Tonya's mom over $3,000 in child support? Is Jacob the father of Tyler and Matina's child?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Almeta must know why her best friend is so close with her fiancé. Brandon must convince his fiancée and mom that he's no cheater! Jennell canceled her wedding because she thinks her fiancé is unfaithful, but her sister has a shocking secret!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Dashawn and his mom claim that it was only a one-time fling with Monica and he can’t be the father of her child! Then, party girl April wants to find out who fathered her baby! Later, is Frederick or Jason the father of Marietta’s baby?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Maury is celebrating the holidays with some good ‘olé story-telling by the fireplace. He’ll share the stories of past guests that came for paternity tests, lie detectors and more. Find out if these guests have been naughty or nice!

programme.title: The Maury Show: You Slept With 10 Men…I'm Not The Dad!
programme.desc: Zebarious and his new girlfriend want a DNA test to prove he didn’t father Rhonda’s child. But Rhonda doesn’t think so! Later, Mary says her son’s fiancée is a cheater because she hit on her!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Elizabeth swears that a psychic told her and her whole family that her son Nehemiah didn't father Ja'Quasia's baby. But Ja'Quasia doesn't believe in a crystal ball. Then, Heidi and Tabbi claim AJ fathered their kids, but AJ only believes Tabbi!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I'll Prove You Are Cheating on My Teen!
programme.desc: Chris cheated and impregnated Lakin's neighbor. He denies he fathered Lakin’s baby. Then, John’s back for a 3rd DNA test. Can Jade prove that he’s the father or is her record 0-3?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Wild Results ... Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: What happened after the shocking results? Plus Javar and Amber are still furious that their mom wants to marry a man half her age. Will they stop their wedding right before our eyes?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Imagine finding out that the person you've been sharing your life with has been keeping a secret. MAURY's guests say they need to tell the truth – and some of them confess to more than cheating!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Two 26-year old women are at war! Alyssa says Barbara's 74-year-old dad Luis fathered her baby. Is Alyssa using him? Then, Ginny says Demetry signed her son's birth certificate, but never dated. James' aunt thinks that his wife is sleeping around.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Charlotte and Tasheun bonded over their children’s mutual father from a photo album, Brandon, but will the DNA test further confirm this? Then, will Tanya prove that her baby Craig III is the son of Craig Jr.?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Josh is furious that his girlfriend Kathryn may be cheating on him… with his brother! Shandi thinks her boyfriend is living a second life with a secret family. Will Nikita cancel her nuptials to Patrick after she watches the hidden camera video?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kayla loves her fiancé Toby enough to let him, his kids, and baby-mama Lyndsey move in with her! Has he been sleeping with Lyndsey? Geisha's 15-year relationship with Indo might end if he admits to working as a pimp and cheating with his co-worker!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Has Antonio been cheating on Chasity since their wedding day? Is Mike sleeping with his wife Lisa’s mother? Jackie swears Danny is cheating and he swears she is…Maury’s got all of the results!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Tim's 5-year-old daughter told him that "mama slept in the bed with Uncle Tom." Plus, pregnant Mariah wants to know why a plumber found 20 flushed condoms in their toilet, but they don't use condoms!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Teen Daughter's Fiance A Cheater?
programme.desc: If Mayyadah’s husband’s lie detector test proves that he’s having sex through online chat rooms, then they’re getting a divorce! Will Debbie kick fiancée Pablo out over cheating suspicions?

programme.title: The Maury Show: My Wife Had a Threesome. Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Keith is terrified that Chyna cheated and their daughter may not be his. Could Keith’s best friend be the real father? Will the DNA results quash Omar's denials about fathering Jennifer’s child?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Not only does Michelle think Dwayne has a secret alias, but she also suspects he is possibly having an affair with her sister Tiffany. Then, Colleen is sick of his constant lies and wants to know if he has a secret life as "Big Daddy Russ!

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Al hijo de Begüm le cuesta adaptarse a Bursa. Faruk sale de la comisaría y le pide al comandante que averigüe sobre Adem Sezgin.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Murat lleva a Zeynep a cenar a la mansión y Esma se indigna. Nurgül descubre que Bade estaba durmiendo con Murat y Esma los escucha hablar.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Begüm llega a la mansión pero huye cuando Faruk la ve. İpek convence a Fikret para que le compre una casa, pero Faruk cancela la transferencia de fondos.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: Esma insiste en casar inmediatamente a Bade con un carnicero llamado Kadir para mantenerla alejada de Murat. Bade sigue a Murat y Zeynep.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: La Sra. Esma está enojada por el intento de İpek de comprar una casa con Fikret y dejar la propiedad.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: La señora Esma pilla en caliente a Senem cuando vende las joyas que se heredan en la familia.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin
programme.desc: La señora Esma paga la deuda de Senem y exige que de ahora en adelante siempre haga lo que dice.

programme.title: Istanbullu Gelin

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Post preparó un baño para su esposa antes de salir a correr. Regresó y la encontró sin respirar. Murió antes de que llegara la ambulancia. La policía consideró su muerte como accidental hasta que surgió un motivo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1988, se descubrió el cuerpo de una mujer joven en un río de Ohio. La mayor parte de la evidencia había sido borrada, pero el hijo de 6 años de la víctima, sin saberlo, les dijo a los investigadores todo lo que necesitaban saber.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El Negocio de Metales
programme.desc: Los médicos no pueden identificar el origen de la enfermedad de un empresario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Derrick Duehren regresó para encontrar su casa en Oregon hecha cenizas. Los restos calcinados de su esposa se encontraron luego en los escombros. Los investigadores intentaron determinar si fue un accidente desafortunado o un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El asesino probablemente esperaba cubrir sus huellas escenificando la escena del crimen. Pero los investigadores descubrieron el intento casi de inmediato y recurrieron a la ciencia forense para saber qué sucedió esa noche realmente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de una Convención de Filadelfia, 180 legionarios contraen síntomas similares a la neumonía y 29 de ellos mueren. La determinación de un científico ayuda a identificar la causa de esta enfermedad mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El caso musical
programme.desc: En 1999, una niña de 12 años fue encontrada asesinada en su casa y cambió la sensación de seguridad que tenían los residentes de la pequeña ciudad de Waseca, Minnesota.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres fueron asesinados mientras dormían en sus camas. La noche siguiente, un incendio provocó la destrucción de una clínica de planificación familiar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra a Joann Katrinak muerta en un campo de maíz con su hijo pequeño, el sospechoso más obvio es el esposo y padre de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una modelo aspirante apareció muerta y el sospechoso principal fue su novio. Cuando finalmente se le dio el visto bueno, los investigadores tuvieron que buscar más profundamente para poder encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía de Alaska encontró el cuerpo de una mujer mientras patrullaba de rutina un parque público.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, cuando Steven Fortin ataca a la Oficial de Policía Estatal de Maine fuera de su hora servicio, Vicky Gardner, durante una parada rutinaria, se desencadena una serie de eventos que reinician de golpe un caso de asesinato estancado en New Jersey.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, el pornógrafo de San Francisco Artie Mitchell fue asesinado en su casa. Su hermano y socio comercial, que fue encontrado cerca del lugar con un rifle, luego confiesa haber disparado a Artie, pero la pregunta es si el disparo fue premeditado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los testigos vieron a una mujer en la parte trasera de un camión, agitando los brazos y gritando. Cuando encontraron una chaqueta cerca de un charco de sangre, supieron que lo que habían visto no había sido un paseo divertido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encuentra a Nancy Newman y a sus dos hijas que fueron brutalmente asesinadas. La escena del crimen no tiene escasez de pruebas, pero los investigadores no pueden encontrar un vínculo concluyente con su principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Aceitoso en la mañana
programme.desc: Cuando la policía recuperó el automóvil sumergido de un hombre al que se denunció su desaparición, esperaban encontrar su cuerpo, pero no estaba allí.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven pareja decidió celebrar su primer aniversario de bodas con un viaje de campamento a Mount Hood.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las primeras horas de la mañana, justo antes de Navidad, una estudiante universitaria fue secuestrada del estacionamiento de su departamento. Su cuerpo fue encontrado más tarde ese día. Ella había sido agredida sexualmente y fue disparada a quemarropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando el número y volumen de manchas de sangre es mayor que la habitual en la escena del crimen, es el trabajo de los científicos forenses el determinar el por qué.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Por lo general, es fácil determinar cómo un criminal entró en la escena del crimen. Pero en este caso, estaba lejos de esclarecerse. Parecía que el asesino se desvaneció y quizá lo hizo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Programado para el desastre
programme.desc: Una mujer de 29 años murió instantáneamente cuando una bomba explotó en su casa. El dispositivo era tan poderoso que la metralla estaba incrustada en las casas al otro lado de la calle.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los crímenes más descarados del siglo 20. Adolph Coors III, el ejecutivo de Coors Brewing Company, fue secuestrado y retenido para un rescate.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer muere mientras paseaba a sus perros por el bosque. Como no tenía enemigos y su marido tiene una coartada, la policía asume que fue un accidente de caza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación del secuestro de la esposa de un prominente banquero llevó a la policía a una persecución inútil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Laura Houghteling desapareció de su casa en Bethesda y nunca más se la volvió a ver. Los científicos forenses usan evidencia de su habitación para dirigir a la policía hacia un sospechoso principal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las mujeres en una ciudad de Louisiana viven con el temor de un violador que no deja pistas sobre su identidad. Pero la tecnología y la ciencia del comportamiento se combinan para brindar a la policía una nueva herramienta forense.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Pointer mix is fixated on pinecones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar travels to the U.K. to help troubled dog owners with a territorial street dog and a dalmatian whose personality can turn ugly.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Problem dogs in the U.K. including two dogs that spent most of their lives in Africa, and a barking Jack Russell terrier mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal descubre el foto montaje de él y Sara como pareja política. Víctor termina en el hospital con un coma etílico. Calixta, Marisa y Amelia conversan sobre el nuevo proyecto, Amelia se entusiasma con la idea y quiere participar.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara recibe una llamada de Estanislao para amenazarla y Frank es testigo de su reacción, conociendo las sospechas de Oscar. Cristóbal ofrece ayuda a Marisa con la agencia de empleos. Oscar le promete a Calixta encontrar a sus hermanos desaparecidos.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal Parker se prepara para la inauguración del centro de apoyo y el cierre de la campaña. Jerome le plantea a Cristóbal trabajar en un proyecto deportivo para alejar a los jóvenes de las drogas. Las pesquisas de Oscar lo acercan a la verdad.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia Guardiola, viuda de Amador Blanco, vuelve para reclamar a sus gemelos. Tras años de prisión por un delito que no cometió, se enfrenta a su suegra y se enamora de su cuñado, sin sospechar las oscuras consecuencias.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia Guardiola, viuda de Amador Blanco, vuelve para reclamar a sus gemelos. Tras años de prisión por un delito que no cometió, se enfrenta a su suegra y se enamora de su cuñado, sin sospechar las oscuras consecuencias.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Griselda se entera del secreto de Teresa Cristina por un video que Antonio encuentra en la computadora de Marcela. Ella decide callar para no herir a Patricia, pero Antonio tiene otros planes. Fernando contrata a una mujer para que seduzca a Kike.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Paloma le cuenta a Griselda todo lo que sabe de Teresa Cristina. Reinaldo visita a Teresa Cristina y ella le da su dinero para que pague la deuda del restaurante. Él le lleva a Griselda un cheque por el valor que ella invirtió.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Kike busca a Bárbara para pedirle explicaciones sobre el dinero que ha estado gastando últimamente y acaban haciendo el amor. Kike le da la oportunidad de volver a ser una familia. Máximo conoce a Clara y surge entre ellos una atracción inmediata.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Antonio enfrenta a Teresa Cristina con el video de Marcela. José Salinas aparece, le quita el computador y borra el archivo. Carol habla con Paloma y trata de crearle una mala imagen de Iván. Teresa Cristina llama a Fernando y traman contra Antonio.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Oscar le pide a Sara y a Bruno reconocer la piedra robada, él nota que a ella le inquieta su visita. Cristóbal expresa su deseo de comprometerse con Sara. Frank se preocupa por la ilusión de Mireya con Víctor, mientras tiene una crisis etílica.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse is shocked by her soon-to-be-divorced mother's quick and free-spirited plunge into the singles world.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex discovers that his idol, young Uncle Ned, has a serious drinking problem.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex pretends to support the Equal Rights Amendment to impress a pretty feminist.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory turns to Alex for some advice when she begins to fear she'll lose her new boyfriend unless she agrees to his pleas for a more "adult" romance.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse is excited at the prospect of reviving her folk-singing career at a local nightclub.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is so sure that he will be named valedictorian of his class that he can't cope with the thought of being defeated by a girl-especially his girl.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex courts disaster when he invites two dates to the senior prom. He devises an elaborate scheme for escorting each of the unknowing girls on a night to remember.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Alex's pal Skippy discovers he's adopted, Alex helps him cope with the shocking news.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Elyse has a convention speech in 'fascinating east coast resort' Atlantic City, she didn't plan to waste any time and money gambling.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: The news that their mother is pregnant sends the three Keaton kids into an angry outburst resulting in a family battle.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is thrilled to be taking a college course taught by one of his personal heroes, Professor Ephraim Bronski. In his eagerness to impress the teacher he gets off to a bad start and is humiliated by his idol when he fails the first-class assignment.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex reluctantly accepts a part-time job with his father at the non-profit station, and his dad is bursting with pride to have him following in his footsteps.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As an economics student, Alex finds it demeaning to be forced into a public service position, but his experiences at the crisis center give him a new outlook on life.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven gets depressed from interviewing frightfully inept candidates as housekeeper-nanny for the baby, such as a child-hater ad an ex-con.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While Steven and Elyse are away on vacation, Mallory accidentally crashes her parents' car into a telephone pole. The kids need to raise money for auto repairs and decides to turn the Keaton house into a hotel.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex's chances for acceptance into a smug college fraternity are dependent upon him having a knockout date for the pledge dance.

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work as police detectives in a school. Their assignment: to investigate drug selling.

programme.title: The Unity Of Heroes
programme.desc: Wong Fei Hung battles foreign and domestic enemies to stop the distribution of a dangerous narcotic, risking all to save lives.

programme.title: Undercover Punch & Gun
programme.desc: An undercover cop’s plan to infiltrate a drug ring is compromised when a rival agency attacks mid-trade, killing the gang’s leader. Their cover blown, the teams must unite in order to overthrow the ruthless smuggler behind it all.

programme.title: Rising Shaolin: The Protector
programme.desc: Debao, framed for murder, finds refuge with a Shaolin monk who trains him in martial arts and empathy, shaping his path to redemption.

programme.title: The Flying Swordsman
programme.desc: Hu Fei, the son of the sword master Hu YiDao, has to avenge his father's death to eight evil men.

programme.title: The King of Fighters
programme.desc: The surviving descendants of three legendary clans are transported to other dimensions to test their martial arts skills against an evil force that seeks to invade and overrun the world as we know it.

programme.title: Tekken
programme.desc: The year is 2039. The world wars have destroyed everything and territories are run by corporations, the mightiest of which is TEKKEN. In the midst of the ruined society, one warrior rises from the streets.

programme.title: Double Dragon
programme.desc: Evil meets its match in this daring martial arts adventure about two teen brothers out to stop an obsessed tycoon from finding both halves of a mystical talisman.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts prepara un festín al estilo sureño para toda la familia, que incluye ensalada crujiente de repollo y pollo asado en menos de 30 minutos.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts está haciendo una deliciosa fiesta griega en aproximadamente 30 minutos, por menos de $30.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: PJ's Steakhouse se está muriendo por la falta de control de la gerencia en la calidad de la comida, con un dueño un poco grosero y su esposo, el copropietario, sentados en el bar bebiendo todo el día.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay hace el viaje a Carlstadt, Nueva Jersey, para visitar Grasshopper Also, un restaurante que ha visto días mejores. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Viajando al North End de Boston, el chef Ramsay pasa una semana en Davide, un restaurante italiano mal administrado por hermanos enemistados. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Providence, Rhode Island, para visitar DownCity, un restaurante con un avance detenido por un propietario obstinado y de mal genio. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Todo un chef
programme.desc: La cocina es el corazón de cada hogar y queremos que lo pongas a latir con las mejores recetas, que compartas en familia y te luzcas como #TodoUnChef.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Peter's, un restaurante italiano familiar en Babylon, Nueva York. Descubre que el restaurante se está hundiendo debido a su descarado gerente y copropietario.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay viaja a The Olde Stone Mill en Tuckahoe, Nueva York. Aunque el frente ha sido renovado, la cocina todavía sirve comida menos que estelar.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay está en la Gran Manzana para remodelar Dillon's, un restaurante indio a solo unas cuadras de su próspero restaurante.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her Minnesota home. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite died after falling down the stairs, witness accounts contradicted evidence. To find out what really happened, investigators employed a physicist and an expert in accident reconstruction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most unusual cases in forensic history. Investigators had to find a way to solve a murder case using only a squashed tomato found at the crime scene and tiny, pinpoint reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Lori Auker left her Pennsylvania home for work and never arrived, it took space-age technology, cat hairs and insects to pinpoint the woman's abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19, was convicted of stabbing her mother, Barbara Mullenix, in 2006. She allegedly packed her mother's bloodied corpse in a cardboard box before dumping it in California's Newport Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his mother, wife and three children in his mansion ballroom before disappearing completely. Detectives must solve the case, despite having only an outdated photograph of List.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, the Florida mobile home of Effie and Michael Ratley catches fire. Michael heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is found beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered. The similarities of the crime scenes led police to conclude they were dealing with a serial killer who harbored an intense hatred of women.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Special Tribute
programme.desc: 25 years after its premiere, Forensic Files remains the most successful true-crime series of all time. Inspired by the O.J. Simpson murder case, the series went onto over 400 episodes where science catches the bad guys.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An Alaskan police officer finds a woman's body while on routine patrol of a public park. During the autopsy, the medical examiner preserves the portion of her rib cage which sustained the fatal wound.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, 4-year-old April Loveless was found dead in the backyard of her Texas home. Her parents told police that she was attacked and killed by wild dogs. Investigators did not agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Chris Ochoa confessed to the 1988 rape and murder of Nancy DePriest, the case was closed. 8 years later, Achim Marino confessed to the same crime. Can DNA evidence identify the real perpetrator?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A go-go dancer told her family she needed to get away for a while and then she simply disappeared. Investigators were suspicious, because she took neither her car nor her clothes. 20 years later, her family received a call that changed everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers decide that the only way to win against Master Vile is to journey to a distant galaxy.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Master Vile uses Dischordia to try to control the Pink and Yellow Rangers with her voice.

programme.title: Navidad en las Rocallosas
programme.desc: Sarah se dirige al emproblemado rancho de su tío para escapar de New York. De regreso a casa surgen complicaciones cuando Graham, una estrella de Hollywood, llega al rancho para prepararse para su próxima película.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Happy Days

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Jack relents and allows Tim to visit Heartland, the simmering sibling rivalry between Amy and Lou heats to a boil.

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: With the Fall Finale only a few days away, Amy finds herself working with the enemy after Ben convinces Ashley that Heartland is the only place that can help her suddenly uncooperative horse.

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy tries to help a horse who's become skittish around water after his constable rescues a 15-year-old from drowning.

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: During a late summer heatwave, Ty's dad shows up with a truck full of sick, thirsty horses bound for the slaughterhouse. Amy recognizes one of the horses and the mystery deepens.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Much to her mother's dismay, Ashley is staying at Heartland and has promoted herself to VP of guest relations. Ty is still trying to make amends with Amy for his latest relationship snafu.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack's patience is tried as Tim recovers from his shooting injury at Heartland. Amy uncovers some surprises about an ex-owner of a horse she's hoping to re-home.

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay desafía los paladares de los equipos en una prueba de sabor a ciegas. En un servicio de cena abarrotado, la ansiedad es mayor de lo normal cuando pasan las celebridades Eric McCormack y Robert Patrick.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El resto de los Chefs deberán preparar un plato a base de cangrejos y cada equipo presentará su plato más fuerte al Chef Ramsay. Durante el servicio de cena, los equipos crean sus propios menús.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay separa a los equipos. Ahora los seis Chefs restantes están solos, cada uno preparando un plato con catorce ingredientes simples.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de un viaje a Atlantic City Borgata, donde el ganador pronto será un gran Chef, los competidores deben preparar un plato original que se servirá en el aclamado hotel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay cocina para los cuatro Chefs restantes y luego les dice que repitan lo que han preparado. Posteriormente, se planea una propuesta de sorpresa para el menú de postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los tres finalistas preparen una comida para 100 de los mejores Chefs de Los Ángeles. El ganador aparece en un programa de televisión, mientras que los perdedores tienen que lavar y planchar la ropa de cama.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas deberán trabajar con un arquitecto para diseñar los espacios del restaurante para el desafío de la cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos concursantes se enfrentan en su última competencia de la cena final. El ganador asume el cargo de Chef en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del estreno de la temporada, dieciséis concursantes tienen la oportunidad de alcanzar el estrellato culinario y un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en la ciudad turística canadiense de Whistler, Columbia Británica.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del estreno de temporada, vuelve un competidor de la quinta temporada y los quince cocineros restantes se preparan para una cena marinera.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay despierta a los Chefs restantes en medio de la noche y les ordena que preparen una cena de espaguetis para los bomberos hambrientos. Los perdedores deben lavar y encerar los camiones de bomberos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los competidores deben crear perros calientes de proporciones perfectas para las celebridades Drew Lachey, John O'Hurley, Tom Green, Melinda Clarke, Christopher 'Kid' Reid y Kristy Swanson.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce Chefs restantes deberán planificar un saludo gastronómico por el regreso de un marine americano. El equipo perdedor tendrá que limpiar y decorar la fiesta de Tana Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes deben crear comidas de tres platos que sumen solo 700 calorías. Los ganadores fueron a la playa con la jugadora de voleibol de playa Annett Davis.

programme.desc: Lucy anticipates a 2nd honeymoon with Ricky on their boat trip to Europe, but Ricky's band duties keep him too busy. Lucy happily looks forward to romantic evenings and daytime deck games on board the ship as the Ricardos and the Mertzes sail for Europe.

programme.desc: Lucy is thrilled at being in London, and most of all wants to see the Queen. She misses the Queen at Buckingham Palace where she and Ethel try to make the guard smile.

programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.desc: Equipped with an English-French dictionary, Lucy sets out to explore Paris and discover an artist whose paintings will become very valuable – she knows she has "the eye.

programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes, sightseeing in Paris, are sitting at a sidewalk cafe that Charles Boyer is known to frequent. Lucy thinks she has spotted Boyer and turns to jelly, but Ricky convinces her it's a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy goes on a hunger strike in order to get Ricky to buy an expensive dress from a famous French designer. He finally gives in but returns the dress when he discovers that Ethel smuggled her food while on the strike.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred, managing Ricky's band while on European tour, routes the musicians to Locarno instead of Lucerne. Ricky is distraught and Lucy suggests a hike in the Alps with the Mertzes to take his mind off his problems.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although they both agree not to try and influence Little Ricky's future, Lucy buys a toy doctor kit and Ricky gives him a drum set. Their son takes to the drums and begins to play it non-stop for days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Orson Welles is scheduled to perform for a benefit in Ricky's club. Ricky is worried that Lucy will foul things up if she is around so he decides to send her off to Florida.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World

programme.desc: A young park guest accidentally strands himself in the Pteranodon aviary, requiring Owen and a testy Stygimoloch to stage a daring rescue.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Nikki takes a step back from her relationships. Brandi and Princess take action in getting revenge on Moniece, with a little help from Jason Lee. Lyrica's mom has an odd request for her daughter, causing a family blowout.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Brandi's revenge plot gets back to Moniece and Fizz. When Ray's mom expresses concerns about his marriage, his relationship with Princess turns sour. Lyrica's mom goes to extremes for revenge against A1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Lyrica takes steps to bring peace between the two mothers. Moniece is on a mission to find the source of the sex tape leak. Princess has issues with Ray and Sonja leading up to the marriage. Teairra is forced to face her demons.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Wedding week is here! Ray and Princess are still at odds and it's unclear if they'll make it down the aisle. Teairra realizes the gravity of her legal and personal problems.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: The cast of Love & Hip Hop Hollywood reunites as host Nina Parker dives into all of the drama from Season 3. Moniece crosses the line on Brandi's family. Nikki reveals if she's with Rosa or Safaree and a guest sends Masika for the exit.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: The drama continues on part two of The Reunion when Masika and Hazel face off. We find out what was in Willie and Kyesha's texts. Moniece shocks everyone when she alleges one of the fellas has a baby with a side chick.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Keyshia Cole confronts unresolved issues with her estranged husband Booby. Chaos erupts when Hazel-E squares off against her haters. A new arrival threatens to turn Masika's world upside-down. Teairra's lunch date goes all the way left.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Ray J's struggle to start a family leads to an outrageous bet with A1 and Safaree. Keyshia gets advice from Too Short. Nikki Baby connects Chanel West Coast with a producer. Brooke goes on a mission to uncover the truth about Marcus.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Teairra's new man clashes with her social circle. Chanel leaps to her friend's defense at Safaree's party. Ray J's secret weighs on his conscience. Lyrica issues a startling demand to A1. Alexis and Solo's relationship hits a snag.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Masika hires Misster Ray to plan an event, only to get caught in the crossfire. Concerns mount over Teairra's self-destructive behavior. A1 considers a collaboration with Keyshia Cole. Brooke and Booby hatch a plan to teach Marcus a lesson.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Mayhem erupts at Safaree and Chanel's music video shoot. Misster Ray's attempt to make nice with Masika leads to a wild encounter with Zell. A betrayed Teairra lashes out at Cisco, Moniece, and Nia. Keyshia gets caught in the middle of a marital spat.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Shocking allegations blow up Masika and Nia's dinner for Zell and Misster Ray. Teairra and Cisco's shopping trip ends in tears. Moniece struggles with 'the other woman' in her relationship. Booby worries about Keyshia's response to his latest move.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: The Hollywood women are forced to pick sides in a war between cliques. Ray J's effort to develop a sexy new image for Bridget Kelly puts a strain on his marriage. Moniece squares off with A.D.'s best friend. Teairra learns the ugly truth about Cisco.

programme.title: Life in the Blue
programme.desc: Swim amongst the amazing biodiversity just under the surface of the open ocean.

programme.title: The Canary Islands
programme.desc: Discovering the wildlife and flora that call the Canary Islands home; how life on these remote landmasses have led to some unique evolutionary traits.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Located six degrees above the equator, Sri Lanka is an island that has enough wildlife to rival a vast continent.

programme.title: Wild Austria
programme.desc: Take a cinematic journey through Austria's stunning geography, where water is life. Glide through snow-capped Alpine highlands and the last primeval forests, across powerful glaciers and raging waterfalls, and over a warm steppe lake.

programme.title: The Canary Islands
programme.desc: The impacts the modern world has had on the Canary Islands' secluded wildlife and how some species are surviving on the edge of extinction.

programme.title: Islands in a Desert Sea
programme.desc: Explore the rich, biodiverse Sea of Cortez, where survival hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Penguins: The African Chaplin
programme.desc: African penguins are unique on the African continent and fight against extinction. Despite the protection of the islands where they live, the population continues to decline and scientists are trying to prevent the disappearance of the species.

programme.title: Shetland's Otters
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the shy, sweet otters that live in these remote islands.

programme.title: The Beach: Wildlife Around the Parasol
programme.desc: Taking a look at the breathtaking microcosm of nature that unfolds on the world's beaches.

programme.title: Deadly Australians
programme.desc: Exploring Australia's forest floors and canopies to reveal the poisonous, fiercest and deadliest animals, insects and even plant life.

programme.title: Deadly Australians
programme.desc: Exploring Australia's complex waterways to reveal the continent's deadliest animals, from snakes and crocodiles to archer fish and sea eagles.

programme.title: Wild Austria: Created by Water
programme.desc: Winter is a tough time for creatures in the Austrian Alps; as spring comes, millions of migratory birds flock to the lowlands around Lake Neusiedl.

programme.title: Deadly Australians
programme.desc: The deadliest killers lurking below the surface of Australia's waters; witnessing the toxic, venomous and poisonous ocean creatures in action; great whites, box jellyfish, lionfish and more.

programme.title: Wildest Europe
programme.desc: The wildlife of Europe's waterways.
